title: Greeting and Introducing Yourself
prompt: Greet someone and introduce yourself in English.
hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you', and 'My name is...'.
sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

ja.prompt: 誰かに挨拶して自己紹介してください。
ja.hint: 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you', 'My name is...' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

zh.prompt: 用英文向某人打招呼並自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用像是 'Good morning', 'Nice to meet you', 'My name is...' 的句子。
zh.sample: Good morning! Nice to meet you. My name is Kate.

title: Asking and Answering About Objects
prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What's this?' and 'It's a...'.
hint: Use 'What's this?' to ask about an object and answer with 'It's a...' followed by the object's name.

ja.prompt: 'What's this?' を使って物について質問し、'It's a...' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'What's this?' で物を尋ね、'It's a...' の後に物の名前を言いましょう。

zh.prompt: 使用 'What's this?' 問物品，並用 'It's a...' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'What's this?' 詢問物品，回答時用 'It's a...' 加上物品名稱。

title: Talking About Abilities
prompt: Talk about what you can or cannot do using 'Can you...?' and 'Yes, I can' or 'No, I can't'.
hint: Ask about abilities with 'Can you...?' and respond with 'Yes, I can' or 'No, I can't'.
sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can.

ja.prompt: 'Can you...?' を使ってできることを尋ね、'Yes, I can' または 'No, I can't' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Can you...?' で能力を尋ね、'Yes, I can' または 'No, I can't' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can.

zh.prompt: 用 'Can you...?' 詢問能力，並用 'Yes, I can' 或 'No, I can't' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'Can you...?' 問能力，回答時用 'Yes, I can' 或 'No, I can't'。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can.

title: Talking About Time and Daily Routine
prompt: Ask and answer about daily routines and times using 'What time do you get up?' and 'I get up at...'.
hint: Use 'What time do you...?' to ask about routines and answer with 'I ... at ...'.
sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

ja.prompt: 'What time do you...?' を使って日課や時間を尋ね、'I ... at ...' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'What time do you...?' で日課を尋ね、'I ... at ...' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

zh.prompt: 用 'What time do you...?' 詢問日常作息時間，並用 'I ... at ...' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'What time do you...?' 問作息時間，回答時用 'I ... at ...'。
zh.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

title: Talking About Possessions
prompt: Ask and answer about possessions using 'Whose ... is this?' and 'It's ...' or 'It's mine'.
hint: Use 'Whose ... is this?' to ask about ownership and answer with 'It's ...' or 'It's mine'.
sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's.

ja.prompt: 'Whose ... is this?' を使って所有者を尋ね、'It's ...' または 'It's mine' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Whose ... is this?' で所有者を尋ね、'It's ...' または 'It's mine' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's.

zh.prompt: 用 'Whose ... is this?' 詢問物品所有者，並用 'It's ...' 或 'It's mine' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'Whose ... is this?' 問所有者，回答時用 'It's ...' 或 'It's mine'。
zh.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's.

title: Talking About Age
prompt: Ask and answer about age using 'How old are you?' and 'I'm ... years old'.
hint: Use 'How old are you?' to ask someone's age and answer with 'I'm ... years old'.
sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

ja.prompt: 'How old are you?' で年齢を尋ね、'I'm ... years old' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'How old are you?' で年齢を尋ね、'I'm ... years old' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

zh.prompt: 用 'How old are you?' 問年齡，並用 'I'm ... years old' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'How old are you?' 問年齡，回答時用 'I'm ... years old'。
zh.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

title: Talking About Likes and Dislikes
prompt: Ask and answer about likes and dislikes using 'Do you like ...?' and 'Yes, I do' or 'No, I don't'.
hint: Use 'Do you like ...?' to ask preferences and answer with 'Yes, I do' or 'No, I don't'.
sample: Do you like soccer? Yes, I do.

ja.prompt: 'Do you like ...?' で好き嫌いを尋ね、'Yes, I do' または 'No, I don't' で答えてください。
ja.hint: 'Do you like ...?' で好みを尋ね、'Yes, I do' または 'No, I don't' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: Do you like soccer? Yes, I do.

zh.prompt: 用 'Do you like ...?' 問喜好，並用 'Yes, I do' 或 'No, I don't' 回答。
zh.hint: 用 'Do you like ...?' 問喜好，回答時用 'Yes, I do' 或 'No, I don't'。
zh.sample: Do you like soccer? Yes, I do.

title: Asking for and Giving Directions
prompt: Ask for directions and give directions using phrases like 'Where is ...?' and 'Go straight and turn right/left'.
hint: Use 'Where is ...?' to ask location and give directions with 'Go straight', 'turn right', or 'turn left'.
sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 'Where is ...?' で場所を尋ね、'Go straight', 'turn right', 'turn left' で道案内をしてください。
ja.hint: 'Where is ...?' で場所を尋ね、'Go straight', 'turn right', 'turn left' で道を教えましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 用 'Where is ...?' 問路，並用 'Go straight', 'turn right', 'turn left' 給予指示。
zh.hint: 用 'Where is ...?' 問地點，回答時用 'Go straight', 'turn right', 'turn left'。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

title: Talking About Weather and Clothing
prompt: Talk about the weather and what to wear using phrases like 'It's cold and windy' and 'Put on your coat'.
hint: Describe the weather and suggest clothing accordingly.
sample: It's cold and windy. Please put on your coat.

ja.prompt: 天気や服装について話してください。例：'It's cold and windy', 'Put on your coat'.
ja.hint: 天気を説明し、それに合った服装を提案しましょう。
ja.sample: It's cold and windy. Please put on your coat.

zh.prompt: 談論天氣和穿著，使用 'It's cold and windy' 和 'Put on your coat' 等句子。
zh.sample: It's cold and windy. Please put on your coat.

title: Talking About Daily Activities
prompt: Describe what you did yesterday using 'What did you do yesterday?' and answer with activities.
hint: Use past tense verbs to talk about yesterday's activities.
sample: What did you do yesterday? I flew kites in the park.

ja.prompt: 'What did you do yesterday?' で昨日の活動を尋ね、過去形で答えてください。
ja.hint: 過去形の動詞を使って昨日の活動を話しましょう。
ja.sample: What did you do yesterday? I flew kites in the park.

zh.prompt: 用 'What did you do yesterday?' 問昨天做了什麼，並用過去式回答。
zh.hint: 使用過去式動詞描述昨天的活動。
zh.sample: What did you do yesterday? I flew kites in the park.
